name: axidence

metadata.name: axidence
metadata.summary: strax-based data-driven accidental coincidence background simulation and peak-level salting

documentation:
# Axidence

[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/786146724.svg)](https://zenodo.org/badge/latestdoi/786146724)
[![Test package](https://github.com/XENONnT/axidence/actions/workflows/pytest.yml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/XENONnT/axidence/actions/workflows/pytest.yml)
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/XENONnT/axidence/badge.svg?branch=main&kill_cache=1)](https://coveralls.io/github/XENONnT/axidence?branch=main&kill_cache=1)
[![PyPI version shields.io](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/axidence.svg)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/axidence/)
[![Documentation Status](https://readthedocs.org/projects/axidence/badge/?version=latest)](https://axidence.readthedocs.io/en/latest/?badge=latest)
[![pre-commit.ci status](https://results.pre-commit.ci/badge/github/XENONnT/axidence/main.svg)](https://results.pre-commit.ci/latest/github/XENONnT/axidence/main)

Axidence is a stax-based data-driven accidental coincidence background simulation framework. It can also perform the peak-level salting to calculate the features related to ambient environment.

# Installation
```
cd axidence
pip install ./ --user
```

functions.name: axidence.utils.copy_dtype
documentation:
Copy dtype from dtype_reference according to required_names.
Args:
    dtype_reference (list): dtype reference to copy from
    required_names (list or tuple): names to copy

Returns:
    list: copied dtype

classes.name: axidence.samplers.Sampler
documentation:
A class for
1. sampling data from a distribution
2. reweight the sampled data given a reference distribution

classes.name: axidence.plugins.meta.run_meta.RunMeta
documentation: Plugin that provides run metadata.

functions.name: axidence.context.ordinary_context
documentation: Return a straxen context without paring and salting.

functions.name: axidence.context.plugin_factory
documentation:
Create new plugins inheriting from the plugin which provides
data_type.

functions.name: axidence.context.replication_tree
documentation:
Replicate the dependency tree.

The plugins in the new tree will have the suffixed depends_on,
provides and data_kind as the plugins in original tree.

functions.name: axidence.context._salt_to_context
documentation: Register the salted plugins to the context.

functions.name: axidence.context._pair_to_context
documentation: Register the paired plugins to the context.

functions.name: axidence.context.salt_to_context
documentation: Register the salted plugins to the context.

functions.name: axidence.context.salt_and_pair_to_context
documentation: Register the salted and paired plugins to the context.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.peaks_salted.PeaksSalted.compute
documentation: Copy features of events_salting into peaks_salted.

classes.name: axidence.plugins.cuts.cut_pairing_exists.PairingExists
documentation: Cut of successfully paired AC with AC-type(`event_type`)

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.events_salting.EventsSalting.init_rng
documentation: Initialize the random number generator.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.events_salting.EventsSalting.sample_time
documentation: Sample the time according to the start and end of the run.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.events_salting.EventsSalting.set_chunk_splitting
documentation: Split the rujn into chunks to prevent oversize chunk.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.events_salting.EventsSalting.sample_area
documentation: Sample the area according to the distribution.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.events_salting.EventsSalting.sampling
documentation: Sample the features of events, (t, x, y, z, S1, S2) et al.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.salting.events_salting.EventsSalting.compute
documentation: Copy and assign the salting events into chunk.

classes.name: axidence.plugins.pairing.events_paired.EventsForcePaired
documentation:
Mimicking Events Force manually pairing of isolated S1 & S2 Actually NOT
used in simulation, but just for debug.

classes.name: axidence.plugins.pairing.events_paired.EventInfosPaired
documentation:
Superset to EventInfo Besides the features in EventInfo, also store the
shadow and ambience related features and the origin run_id, group_number,
time of main S1/2 peaks and the pairing-type.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.pairing.peaks_paired.PeaksPaired.shadow_reference_selection
documentation:
Select the reference events for shadow matching, also return
weights.

methods.name: axidence.plugins.pairing.peaks_paired.PeaksPaired.digitize2d
documentation:
Get indices of the 2D bins to which each value in input array
belongs.

Args:
    data_sample: array, data waiting for binning
